name: Zendesk
description: Zendesk is a customer service and support ticketing platform. The API lets you create and manage support tickets, users, organizations, and knowledge base articles. It powers help desks, live chat, and omnichannel customer communication workflows.

capabilities.name: create_ticket
capabilities.description: Create a new support ticket with a subject, description, priority, and assignee. The ticket enters the support queue for agent resolution.

capabilities.name: list_tickets
capabilities.description: Retrieve all support tickets with filtering by status, assignee, and priority. Supports pagination for large volumes.

capabilities.name: update_ticket
capabilities.description: Update an existing ticket's status, priority, assignee, or add a new comment. Used to progress tickets through the resolution workflow.

capabilities.name: search_tickets
capabilities.description: Search tickets using Zendesk query language. Find tickets by keyword, requester, tag, status, or any combination of fields.

capabilities.name: list_users
capabilities.description: Retrieve all users (agents, admins, and end-users) in your Zendesk account with role and group information.

capabilities.name: create_user
capabilities.description: Create a new user in Zendesk. Can be an end-user (customer), agent, or admin depending on the role assigned.

capabilities.name: list_organizations
capabilities.description: Retrieve all organizations in your Zendesk account. Organizations group end-users from the same company together.

capabilities.name: search_articles
capabilities.description: Search the Help Center knowledge base for articles matching a query. Returns article titles, bodies, and URLs.
